title: Config 1: sgd width=512 depth=2 batch=128 aug=affine
methodology: Generated a 2-hidden-layer MLP with width 512, batch size 128, sgd at lr=0.002, dropout=0.1, weight_decay=0.0, augmentation=affine, and label_smoothing=0.0.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
